docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-29-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-09-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GOLDBOSS, LAUREN AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERRENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF LAUREN GOLDBOSS RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDBOSS, LAUREN
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-29-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED JAN-24-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERRENCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS RODRIGO LOBOS IS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DEFENDANT'S WITNESS TAMARA GOULDEN SWORN AND EXAMINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDBOSS, LAUREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TERRENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF LAUREN GODBOSS RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDBOSS, LAUREN
